_comment: Skill Repo Spec v1 s9 -- every path in this repo belongs to exactly one class.
FIXTURE = lifelike test data, must be produced by tools/make_fixtures.py.
DATA    = anything a real run produced. Never git-tracked; resolved out-of-repo by tools/datadir.py.
data_sealed = a path that HELD real data, was purged, and must stay dead.
Enforced by tools/data_boundary.py in .githooks and CI.
_audited: 2026-07-20 -- llmcall is a pure-stdlib codex->cc->claude call primitive. It produces NO real-run data: the only writes are ephemeral mkstemp tempfiles for codex stdin/stdout (in the OS temp dir, unlinked after use), never inside the repo. Tests use only synthetic placeholders (user1@example.com etc.). No DATA-class path, no FIXTURE. Empty lists here are a CONCLUSION (audited, nothing to declare), not a default.
